name: Product Details
description: Everything an agent needs to know about a product — name, category, price, features, and audience. Import this into any pipeline that generates product-centric content.

variables.label: Product Name
variables.hint: Full product name as it should appear in content

variables.label: Product Category
variables.hint: What type of product this is

variables.label: Price
variables.hint: Current price — leave blank if not relevant to the content

variables.label: Key Features
variables.exampleValue: gas spring lift, dual monitor support, cable management tray, memory foam wrist rest, 28-inch width
variables.hint: Comma-separated list of the product's main specs and selling points

variables.label: Target Customer
variables.exampleValue: remote workers who experience back pain after long desk sessions
variables.hint: The specific person this product was made for — be specific about their pain point

variables.label: Unique Selling Point
variables.exampleValue: installs in 30 seconds with no tools and converts any desk to a sit-stand workstation
variables.hint: The one thing that makes this product better than alternatives
